ab: Initu haw kita! A hakulungen nu maku kamu anini a remiad, tayra kita a milisu’ tu matuasay nu niyaru’.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: Ayi kapah! A sanuPangcahen nu mita a masasuwal atu matuasay.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說阿美語。

ab: A tangasa tu haw kita?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: Hay! A tangasa tu kita.
en: B: Yes, we’re almost there.

ab: Vakiaw! Tayni kami a milisu’ i tisuwan.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: Ihu! Mavana’ haw kamu a misanuPangcah? Piulah’ waru!
ch: B:你們會說阿美語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You speak Pangcah! That’s great!

ab: Kapah haw kamu! A hakulungen nu maku kamu a tayra i nipalumaan tu havay a mawmah.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.

ab: Hay, pasevana’ay.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: Katayni itini a masasilsil, aka kapawan a mikerid tu sakawmah.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: Hay pasevana’ay, iratu ku nirapetan niyam tu sakamaumah.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: Tangasa tu haw kita?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: Caay hen, maraay henay ku rarakatan.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: Kaisu ku mirisrisay tu rengus.
en: A: You go and pick up the grass.

ab: Hay! Akuay ku mirisrisay tu rengus.
en: B: Okay, I’ll do the haying.

ab: Pialai kisu tu sapivahuy tu ayam.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: Hayi, akuay ku mivahuyay tu ayam.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: Kapah tu haw kita, a tayra kita anini a remiad i mamelawen tu niruvuan a aadupen.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: Sulinay haw? A makamaan saw kita a tayra?
ch: B:真的嗎?我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Really? How are we going to get there?

ab: A makavasu kita a tayra.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: Sakapahen ku nipisilsil, a micakay tu kita tu paya.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: Hayi!
en: B: Yes.

ab: U ayam ku aayaway, u uner ku lalikulay, kaamu hantu ku mimelaway.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: Pasevana’ay, matalaw kaku tu uner.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: Asiruma, ka u ayam aca ku melawen nu misu.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: Herek nu cacay a tatukian, itini kita a malecapu.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: Hay, aray pasevana’ay.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: Na u maan saw ku nikamelawen nu misu?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: Adihay ku nikamelawan nu maku tu uner, adihay aca ku ayam.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: Sakalamkamen, a malingad tu kita.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: Akahenay saw! Matimel ku kuku’ nu maku.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: Ta! Midanguya haw kita?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: Ta isaw! Tata!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: Aluman ku midanguyay itini.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: Talulung ku itilaay a nanum, itini hanaw tu nu mita a midanguy.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water there is deep, so we just swim here.
